title: cephaelis medusula
intro: Cephaelis medusula, also known as Mayan snuff, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cephaelis medusula can be prepared as a snuff, tea, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
